zh.lifeSummary: Robert de Hulton是Iowerth de Hulton和Mrs Iorwerth ap Bleddyn的兒子，出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蕾托 爾頓。他於大約1187年與Katherine在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蕾托 爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1203年之後在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilton
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert de Hulton was born in Little Hulton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Iowerth de Hulton and Mrs Iorwerth ap Bleddyn. He married Katherine about 1187, in Little Hulton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1203, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert de Hulton est né à Little Hulton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Iowerth de Hulton et Mrs Iorwerth ap Bleddyn. Il a épousé Katherine environ 1187, à Little Hulton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1203, dans sa ville natale.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Hultonはイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアリットル ハルトンでIowerth de HultonとMrs Iorwerth ap Bleddynの息子として生まれた。約1187年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアリットル ハルトンでKatherineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1203年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Hulton(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리틀 훌턴에서 Iowerth de Hulton(와)과 Mrs Iorwerth ap Bleddyn의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1187년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리틀 훌턴에서 Katherine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1203년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert de Hulton родился в местности литл хултон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Iowerth de Hulton и Mrs Iorwerth ap Bleddyn. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine около 1187 г. в местности литл хултон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1203 г. в его родном городе.
